title: Lead Water Sampling Program -- Testing Compliance and Full Service Line Replacement Strategy
summary: Chair Dr. Chol Majok opens Public Works Committee meeting on lead in residential water. DPW Commissioner reports third consecutive testing cycle under EPA 15 ppb action level for 100-home sampling program. City transitioning testing vendor from 120 Water to Trupanti (RFP winner, serves St. Paul and Minneapolis, first NY State client, same lab). Cadmus Group engineering study underway with EPA to prepare for 2027 standard reduction from 15 to 10 ppb. Commissioner chose full service line replacements (public + private side, main to meter) rather than EPA-mandated public-side only -- completed 800 full replacements against 1,500 public-side mandate. City committed to full replacement going forward. Orthophosphate treatment coats interior of lead pipes; residents advised to flush cold water mornings. Water from Skaneateles Lake is lead-free at source -- lead enters through individual home service lines. Commissioner is a city resident with a lead service line himself.

political_signal.description: Council questioning replacement pace relative to EPA mandate while commissioner defends proactive full-replacement approach over mandated partial replacement

processing_notes: DPW Commissioner never identified by name in transcript; role confirmed by context
Transcript corrections: 'Joel Majoke'->Dr. Chol Majok, 'Aaron Reich'/'Ann Wright'->Hanah Ehrenreich, 'NAV'->Marino L. Nave, 'Pawa'->Rita Paniagua, 'Conwell'->likely Rasheada Caldwell (low confidence)
Department of Finance in detected_departments is false positive from 'budget'/'financial' context; DPW is the acting department
120 Water = prior testing vendor (recommended by Buffalo), Trupanti = new vendor via RFP, Cadmus Group = EPA-recommended engineering firm
Segment 1 of 7 from Public Works and Infrastructure Committee Meeting, January 20th 2026
2026-03-21: Linked to CLUSTER-LEAD-REMEDIATION-2026Q1 (7 records from Jan 20 Public Works Committee lead water discussion).
